storylines.title: SEC and CFTC coordinate on crypto regulation
storylines.summary: The SEC issued an interpretation clarifying how federal securities laws apply to certain crypto assets on March 17, 2026. The SEC and CFTC entered into a memorandum of understanding on March 11, 2026 to coordinate on lawful innovation and market integrity.

sources.title: SEC Clarifies the Application of Federal Securities Laws to Crypto Assets
SEC and CFTC Announce Historic Memorandum of Understanding Between Agencies

storylines.title: Hyperliquid ETF race accelerates with multiple filings
storylines.summary: Bitwise filed an updated S-1 for a Hyperliquid ETF on April 11, 2026, as HYPE has surged around 200 percent over the last 12 months. Grayscale, 21Shares, and VanEck are also eyeing HYPE-linked ETFs.

sources.title: Bitwise files updated S-1 for Hyperliquid ETF as HYPE fund race heats up

storylines.title: Trafigura enters Ghana gold sector with $65M financing
storylines.summary: Trafigura signed a gold offtake agreement and provided debt financing for the Bogoso-Prestea mine in Ghana on April 9, 2026. The deal involves $65M in financing and an offtake agreement for gold doré from the mine.

sources.title: Trafigura's Ghana Gold Mine Deal: $65M Financing & Offtake for Bogoso-Prestea - News and Statistics - IndexBox
Trafigura signs deal with Heath Goldfields for gold doré - Mining Technology
Trafigura Signs Offtake, Financing Deal With Ghanaian Gold Miner - Bloomberg.com
Trafigura enters Ghana gold sector with Bogoso-Prestea deal - Reuters

storylines.title: Circle faces regulatory pressure on stablecoin yield
storylines.summary: Circle posted its worst day on record as proposed law could limit stablecoin yield. Circle clarified its USDC freeze policy after a Drift exploit on April 10, 2026 and urged passage of the GENIUS and CLARITY Acts.

sources.title: Circle posts worst day on record as proposed law could limit stablecoin yield - CNBC
Circle clarifies USDC freeze policy after Drift exploit, urges passage of GENIUS and CLARITY Acts - Crypto Briefing
